system_purpose: Edge-hosted crop probe intake and admin review application using one-time token links, operator admin workflows, and encrypted submission storage.
trust_boundaries: Farmer requests enter via one-time token links and must not gain administrative access or cross-probe visibility.
Admin routes trust Cloudflare Access identity headers in production and a local development bypass only when explicitly enabled.
D1 and R2 persistence are application-managed stores that must not retain protected submission data in plaintext for newly written records.
sensitive_data_classes: submission payload ciphertext and decrypted values
